## RF Code Environmental Monitoring Solution

RF Code provides a complete wire-free environmental monitoring and IT asset tracking solution for data centers, edge facilities, and distributed IT environments. The system combines active RFID technology with wireless sensors to deliver real-time visibility into asset locations and environmental conditions without the complexity of wired sensor installations.

### Core Capabilities

**IT Asset Tracking**
- Active RFID asset tags for real-time location tracking
- Rack-level and room-level location precision
- Support for diverse asset types from servers to mobile equipment
- Long battery life tags with field-replaceable options

**Environmental Monitoring**
- Temperature and humidity sensors (R156, R151)
- Fluid detection sensors with spot and location detection (R135, R136)
- Door sensors for access control (R120)
- Dry contact sensors for UPS and electrical monitoring (R130)
- Differential air pressure sensors for airflow optimization (R160)

**Power Monitoring**
- Rack PDU power sensors (R170, R175)
- AC voltage sensors for circuit monitoring (R171, R173)
- Secure monitoring without network connectivity requirements

**RFID Infrastructure**
- M250 Fixed Reader: Processes 140 events/second, monitors up to 1,400 sensors
- A740 Rack Locator: Precise rack-level location tracking
- A750 Room Locator: Room and area differentiation

### Key Benefits

- **100% wireless deployment**: No wiring complexity or maintenance
- **High density**: Up to 1,400 sensors monitored simultaneously per reader
- **Extended range**: Up to 300 feet (91m) read range
- **Scalable**: Add sensors incrementally without system changes
- **Single integration point**: Unified data access through one interface
- **Vendor agnostic**: Works with any PDU, BMS, or DCIM vendor
- **Security**: Sensors operate off-network, reducing attack surface

### Typical Applications

- Data center environmental monitoring
- Colocation facility management
- Edge data centers and server rooms
- Healthcare equipment tracking
- Manufacturing and industrial facilities
- IT closet and cabinet monitoring

### Product Families

**Readers & Locators**
- M250 Fixed Reader
- A740 Rack Locator
- A750 Room Locator

**Asset Tags**
- M174 IR Enabled Active RFID Asset Tracking Tag
- M172 Durable IR Enabled Tag (Healthcare)
- M173-i Sealed IR Location Sensor (IP54 rated)
- M175 Ruggedized Industrial Tag
- M184 Mobile Asset Tracking Tag

**Environmental Sensors**
- R156 Temperature & Humidity Sensor
- R151 Tethered Temperature Sensor
- R135 Fluid Detection Sensor (Spot Detection)
- R136 Fluid Detection Sensor (Location Detection)
- R120 Door Sensor
- R130 Dry Contact Sensor
- R160 Differential Air Pressure Sensor

**Power Sensors**
- R175 RPDU Tag (Chatsworth/Vertiv/Legrand)
- R170 RPDU Tag (Server Tech/APC)
- R171 AC Voltage Sensor (6-11mm cables)
- R173 AC Voltage Sensor (12-28mm cables)

**Edge Solutions**
- E200 Sentry IP Camera with Thermal Imaging
- Bluetooth Fluid Sensor for Sentry
